notes: Structured data preserves full source text in description fields and extracts engine-facing indices heuristically.
Transitions are candidates unless marked in manual_transitions; map-derived geometry should supersede candidate inference when available.
Public narration must continue to route hidden_or_dm_facts through Layer 2 before reveal.

random_encounters.name: DL1: Dragons of Despair — Rules Engine Reference
random_encounters.heading: DL1: Dragons of Despair — Rules Engine Reference

source.heading: DL1: Dragons of Despair — Rules Engine Reference

random_encounters.name: Encounter Type and Frequency
random_encounters.heading: TABLE 1: Encounter Type and Frequency
random_encounters.description:
Random encounters occur on a **roll of 1 on 1d10**, at the frequency noted below according to terrain. If an encounter is indicated, determine distance according to the table (1 = 10 yards), then roll to generate a number in the Monster Range for that terrain. Use Table 2 for all encounters except the Darken Wood; use Table 3 for Darken Wood.

| Terrain | Check Frequency | Distance Roll | Monster Range |
|---------|----------------|--------------|--------------|
| **Towns** | Once every 3 turns | 1d6 | 1–6 (1d6) |
| **Plains** | 4 times per day | 1d100 | 3–14 (1d12+2) |
| **Forest** | 6 times per day | 1d10 | 4–15 (1d12+3) |
| **Hills/Mountains** | 4 times per day | 1d20 | 7–18 (1d12+6) |
| **Marsh** | 8 times per day | 1d4 | 13–24 (1d12+12) |
| **Ruins** | Once every 3 turns | 1d6 | 11–22 (1d12+10) |

**Note:** Use Table 3 for all encounters in the **Darken Wood** (areas 22–26). The Darken Wood has a special encounter frequency — see Table 3.

---
checks_and_rolls: Random encounters occur on a **roll of 1 on 1d10**, at the frequency noted below according to terrain. If an encounter is indicated, determine distance according to the table (1 = 10 yards), then roll to generate a number in the Monster Range for that terrain. Use Table 2 for all encounters except the Darken Wood; use Table 3 for Darken Wood.

random_encounters.name: 19 — Khisanth (Huge Ancient Black Dragon)
random_encounters.heading: 19 — Khisanth (Huge Ancient Black Dragon)
random_encounters.description:
See complete stat block in DL1_07_MONSTERS_AND_NPCs.md.

**In random encounters:** Khisanth stays in flight. She attacks only **20% of the time** (100% if the PCs attack her). She uses her natural fear ability, then uses one breath weapon if forced into combat. She swoops away before taking any significant damage.

*If rolled as a Newsea/Marsh encounter near area 69b: treat as no encounter — she's not in the tunnels.*

---
checks_and_rolls: **In random encounters:** Khisanth stays in flight. She attacks only **20% of the time** (100% if the PCs attack her). She uses her natural fear ability, then uses one breath weapon if forced into combat. She swoops away before taking any significant damage.

random_encounters.name: The Darken Wood Random Encounters
random_encounters.heading: TABLE 3: The Darken Wood Random Encounters

source.heading: TABLE 3: The Darken Wood Random Encounters

random_encounters.description:
**Encounter frequency:** Roll of **1–2 on 1d6**. Check every **4 game hours** (6 times per game day). If one takes place, roll 2d4 and consult the table below.

**Behavior rule:** Unless otherwise noted, creatures question the PCs. If the PCs give their **true names** or show the **crystal staff**, the creatures escort them to the Forestmaster Unicorn (area 26).
checks_and_rolls: **Encounter frequency:** Roll of **1–2 on 1d6**. Check every **4 game hours** (6 times per game day). If one takes place, roll 2d4 and consult the table below.

random_encounters.name: Encounter Area Summary
random_encounters.heading: Encounter Area Summary
random_encounters.description:
| Terrain Type | Random Encounters Include |
|-------------|--------------------------|
| Towns | Townspeople, disguised draconians, Seeker Guards |
| Plains | Plainsmen, elves, wolves, draconians, trolls, ogres |
| Forest | Satyrs, sprites, spiders, draconians, will-o-wisps |
| Hills/Mountains | Draconians, trolls, giants (if in range), wraiths, will-o-wisps |
| Marsh | Snakes, catoblepas, hatchling dragons, water creatures (from area 44b rules) |
| Ruins | Draconians (all types), wraiths, undead, spectral minions |
| Darken Wood | Forest creatures; guided to Forestmaster unless PCs are enemies |

rows.Random Encounters Include: Plainsmen, elves, wolves, draconians, trolls, ogres
Draconians, trolls, giants (if in range), wraiths, will-o-wisps
Snakes, catoblepas, hatchling dragons, water creatures (from area 44b rules)
Draconians (all types), wraiths, undead, spectral minions
Forest creatures; guided to Forestmaster unless PCs are enemies
